name: ALKALINE-ENCRUSTED CYSTITIS AND PYELITIS
definition: chronic severe urinary tract infection affecting urothelial lining

demographics.Path: mucosal inflammation + encrustation of urothelial lining with struvite + calcium

dominant_finding: diffuse thin / coarse superficial linear urothelial calcifications
distribution: diffuse thin / coarse superficial linear urothelial calcifications
discriminating_features: diffuse thin / coarse superficial linear urothelial calcifications

NECT: diffuse thin / coarse superficial linear urothelial calcifications
